name: claude-skills
description: Ryan Krol's personal Claude Code plugins and skills.

plugins.name: implementation-harness
plugins.description: Scaffold a Ralph-style single-loop, CI-gated TASKS.json implementation harness into any project, author its backlog, and operate it — via skills. Data-driven difficulty auto-tuning (faceted escalation calibration), a portable backlog dashboard, an ideas-to-tasks pipeline, and operational skills for pre-run vetting, interrupt recovery, and reviewing failed tasks into follow-ups. Distinct from the official ralph-loop plugin.
